Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.description:
你是一条传导之道，导引着连接并维系宇宙万物的根本力量。你能够汲取这股超自然的源泉，与盟友建立深刻的灵性纽带，在战斗中强化他们，并在他们受伤时恢复其健康。你的力量会根据你所选择的连接而呈现独特形态，并随着你更深入地探索你的连接，获得新的、更强大的法术。

You're a conduit, channeling the fundamental forces that connect and bind everything in the cosmos. You can draw upon this supernatural wellspring to form deep spiritual bonds with your allies, empower them in combat, and restore their health should they become injured. Your powers take unique shape based on the connection you choose, granting new and more powerful spells as you explore your connection on a deeper level.

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.description:
一场奇异而悖谬的事件永久改变了你的存在，而现在你能够操控现实。你探索多元宇宙的无限可能，也许会将变体时间线或平行世界具象化。你创造出颠覆空间与时间的力场，使你能够施展强大的魔法。你已学会专注于某段锚定的记忆、概念或物体，以帮助你辨识现实。

A strange paradoxical event forever altered your existence, and now you can manipulate reality. You explore the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, possibly visualizing variant timelines or parallel worlds. You create fields that subvert space and time, allowing you to cast powerful magic. You've learned to focus on an anchoring memory, concept, or object to help you identify reality.

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.description:
你是一名专注、机敏的专业人士，能在高风险战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准能力和战术训练让你比竞争对手更具优势——对你来说，即使是最强大的敌人，也不过是另一个要除掉的目标。你在自己所选择的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的造诣。

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition—for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你是范围武器、重甲以及承受伤害方面的大师。你在激烈的战斗中冲锋陷阵，在承受敌方猛烈火力回击的同时，向敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射。通过用强力武器布下压制火力弹幕，你为盟友创造条件，使其能够履行各自的职责，同时促使敌人将注意力集中在你身上。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.description:
你是一位影响力大师。你凭借迷人的微笑、敏捷的机智，以及敏锐的自保意识在物质宇宙中闯出自己的一片天地。你是一名领袖，能够激励队友，推动他们突破极限，并帮助他们渡过难关。你擅长让别人按你的意愿行事，但当情况急转直下时，你也总是准备好迎难而上。你可能是个骗子、外交官、表演者，或是军官——也可能会在局势需要时担任任何角色。

You're a master influencer. You make your way in the universe with a charming smile, quick wit, and keen sense of self-preservation. You're a leader who motivates your teammates, pushes them past their limits, and helps them through tough spots. You excel at getting others to do what you want, but you're always ready to face trouble head-on when things take a turn for the worse. You might be a con artist, diplomat, performer, or military officer—or you might take on whatever role the situation demands.

Solarian.name: 星辉武者 Solarian
Solarian.description:
你是宇宙恒星之力的传导者——一名太阳骑士。重力与光代表了这些力量的两极，而你可以在它们之间进行调谐。作为这一循环的代理者，你能显化出一系列太阳装备，并利用自己与恒星之力的连接来强化它们。无论你偏好恒星光谱中的哪一极，你都可以在它们之间改变自己的调谐状态，以利用通过冥想与练习所获得的太阳力量。

You're a conduit for the stellar forces of the cosmos—a solar knight. The powers of gravity and light represent the extremes of these forces, and you can attune yourself between them. As an agent of this cycle, you manifest an array of solar equipment and use your own connection to stellar forces to empower them. Regardless of which extreme of the stellar spectrum you prefer, you can change your attunement between them to take advantage of solar powers earned through meditation and practice.
